results.title: BeforeSunset AI Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content: for your work. It's a game-changer for freelancers, consultants, and agencies looking to streamline their billing processes. BeforeSunset's user-friendly interface and robust collaboration tools make it a breeze to work with your team. You can easily assign tasks, communicate seamlessly, and monitor progress in real-time. The platform fosters a collaborative work environment, enhancing productivity and fostering stronger team dynamics. Overall, BeforeSunset is an all-in-one project management platform that ticks all the right boxes. It empowers you to take control of your time, combat burnout, and create a healthy work environment for yourself and your team. Whether you're a solopreneur, a small business owner, or part of a large team, BeforeSunset will revolutionize your project [...] BeforeSunset is a game-changer when it comes to project management. With its comprehensive suite of tools and features, it streamlines time, budget, and project management into one powerful platform. As a user, you'll find yourself in full control of your time, productivity, and overall work-life balance. One of the standout features of BeforeSunset is its ability to combat burnout. It understands the importance of maintaining a healthy work environment, not just for yourself but also for your team. With BeforeSunset, you can set realistic goals, manage workloads efficiently, and ensure that everyone on your team is thriving and motivated. The platform offers a seamless experience, making it effortless to track and allocate your time. Its intuitive interface allows you to create projects, [...] and actionable tasks, making it easier for you to stay organized and focused. Additionally, the ability to set goals by tags enhances your daily planning experience and helps you track your progress using analytics. The productivity analysis feature is a great addition as well. Being able to review your personal analytics and identify what has worked and what needs improvement

results.title: Rosebud: The AI-powered personal growth journal - Product Hunt
results.content:
4.9

Based on 24 reviews

Review Rosebud?

Reviewers say Rosebud makes journaling easier to stick with and more useful day to day. They repeatedly praise the AI’s immediate reflections, tailored prompts, memory of past entries, and weekly summaries for helping them feel heard, spot patterns, and turn scattered thoughts into clearer action. Many mention stronger self-awareness, calmer mood, and better follow-through on goals, with voice entry and a smooth interface adding to the habit. The main criticism is that feedback can feel too neutral; one user wants more adjustable tone, and another asks about privacy.

•1 review

I am on a 3 day streak with Rosebud and cannot see a reason why I wouldn't use the app every day. I type in my toughest stuff....things I am really wrestling with.....and most of it makes me feel just BAD about myself in general. Rosebud has a way of taking what I say and giving me a deeper insight....an insight that actually makes me feel GOOD about myself. It's an ai paradigm shift. Rewriting the story of my own destructive narrative one journal entry at a time. And for being a brand new beta app.....I'm freaking impressed.

results.title: Beezi AI: Make AI development structured, secure, and cost-efficient.
results.content:
Valeriia Furmanets
Beezi AI

Beezi AI

@dorrel Thanks, Brice. Your DocMetrics experience is super relevant here.

That's exactly the philosophy behind Beezi. AI is great at processing fast and catching what's easy to miss, but a human stays in control. So we built validation into every step of the workflow. Before anything moves forward, a human can review, add comments, and make fixes directly. That applies to the implementation plan, PR comments, and IDE integration.

It's not just a safety net. It's how you actually get useful output, because the human context and judgment are what make AI decisions reliable. [...] To your question: absolutely. With Beezi, you can choose which tickets are handled by Beezi and which ones a developer wants to take on themselves. It's not all-or-nothing. And even on the Beezi-handled side, the developer stays in control throughout, as they review the implementation plan, approve it before any code is generated, and validate the output before merging. So it's more of a collaboration than a handoff.

Abdelaziz Misbah

The real-time AI cost tracking is something I didn't know I needed until I started using multiple models for the same project and had no idea what I was actually spending.  
  
As a solo maker, does Beezi work for individual developers or is it built exclusively for teams?

Valeriia Furmanets
Beezi AI

Beezi AI
